executives.name: Daniel Wilton
executives.background: Mr. Wilton has 30 years of experience in the mining sector. He was previously a Partner at Pacific Road Capital Management and has held senior roles at CIBC World Markets and Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Lisa Peterson
executives.background: Ms. Peterson is a CPA with over 15 years of experience in financial management and reporting. She previously served as Chief Financial Officer of several junior mining companies.

executives.name: James Maxwell
executives.background: Mr. Maxwell is a professional geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration. He has held senior roles at Sabina Gold & Silver and Claude Resources.

executives.name: Steve Lines
executives.background: Mr. Lines has over 20 years of experience in environmental management and permitting for mining projects. He previously worked at Fortune Minerals and De Beers.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Environment and Community Relations

board_of_directors.name: Keith Neumeyer
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Neumeyer has worked in the investment community since 1984. He is the founder and CEO of First Majestic Silver Corp. and was the founding President of First Quantum Minerals Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel Wilton
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Wilton has 30 years of experience in the mining sector, including senior roles in investment banking and private equity.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Polman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Polman is a CPA with over 30 years of public accounting and corporate finance experience. He was previously the CFO of First Majestic Silver Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Laganiere
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Laganiere is a professional engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operations.

board_of_directors.name: Leanne Hall
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hall is the CEO of Creative Fire and has extensive experience in Indigenous relations and corporate strategy.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
